name: Real document gold set - code_analysis demo_code_analysis.py
input_text: Analyze the selected code file. Identify grounded correctness/runtime issues, recommend concrete refactor steps, and suggest targeted tests.
notes: This gold set is intentionally rubric-based. Future evaluators should score semantic coverage of the expected issues, evidence, refactor actions, tests, snippet summary, and operational risks rather than requiring exact phrasing.

evaluation_guidance.notes: The evaluator should reward outputs that correctly identify the empty-input failure, input mutation, and heterogeneous output shape as the main grounded issues. Narrative fields do not need exact wording, but they should remain consistent with the actual snippet behavior.

snippet_summary_aliases: functions that normalize item scores and compute an aggregate average
score normalization helper plus processing function that returns normalized items and average
code that clamps score bounds and calculates an average over processed items
main_purpose_aliases: normalize score values and compute an average
clamp item scores and return processed items with an average
process a list of scored items and calculate the average

title_aliases: division by zero on empty input
average computation fails when items is empty
evidence_aliases: divides by len(values) without guarding empty input

title_aliases: in-place score clamping mutates original data
items without score pass through unchanged
function returns mixed normalized and raw items
evidence_aliases: items lacking score are returned unchanged

aliases: copy the item before clamping score
always return objects with the same shape
avoid passing raw items through unchanged
test score clamping above 100 and below 0
test that the original input is not mutated
assert output normalization preserves input immutability
make the contract for items with missing score explicit
document or normalize the expected input/output schema
clarify the shape of returned items
extract helper logic for clamping or averaging
simplify the processing flow for readability
downstream callers may observe mutated source objects
mixed output shape can break consumers expecting consistent schema
